title: Closed consultation: Removing zuranolone from the Prescription Drug List - Canada.ca
content:
## Closed consultation: Removing zuranolone from the Prescription Drug List

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from February 7, 2026 to April 18, 2026.
This consultation provided an opportunity to comment on the proposal to remove “zuranolone or its salts” from both the Human and Veterinary parts of the Prescription Drug List (PDL).
View Notice of consultation

## Who was the focus of this consultation
- interested members of the public
- healthcare practitioners
- healthcare professional associations
- any other interested stakeholders
- Canada  Gazette Part I
- Prescription  Drug List
- Controlled Drugs and  Substances Act
- Benzodiazepines and Other Targeted Substances Regulations
Office of  Legislative and Regulatory Affairs Controlled Substances and Overdose Response Directorate Health Canada
Email: csd.regulatory.policy-politique.reglementaire.dsc@hc-sc.gc.ca
